Term Sheet for Series B Funding

This Term Sheet outlines the principal terms under which Dr. Tan Wei Ming ("Investor") and Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah ("Founder") agree to enter into a Series B funding agreement with InnovateTech Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456A) located at 1234 Orchard Lane, Singapore.

1. Amount: The Investor will invest SGD 5,000,000 in InnovateTech Pte. Ltd. in exchange for Series B Preferred Shares.
2. Valuation: Pre-money valuation of InnovateTech is set at SGD 25,000,000.
3. Closing: The closing date shall occur no later than December 31, 2023.
4. NRIC/FIN: The Investor, Dr. Tan Wei Ming, holds NRIC S2345678B. Refer to https://example.sg/user/S2345678B for identification.
5. Contact: For communications, the Investor can be reached at +65 6123 4567 or wei.ming.tan@investor.sg.
6. SPA: The Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") will include customary representations and warranties.
7. Project Plan: The current project plan is not expected to change in the immediate future.
8. SPA: All parties shall comply with the terms set forth in the SPA.

This Term Sheet is intended for discussion purposes only and is not legally binding.
